Title: User can sign up
Preconditions: User has access to the application
Test Data: Valid email, password, name, and phone number
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Tap on the "Sign Up" button
3. Enter the email, password, name, and phone number
4. Tap on the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered and can log in

Title: User can log in
Preconditions: User has registered and the application is open
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Tap on the "Log In" button
3. Enter the email and password
4. Tap on the "Log In" button
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in

Title: User can create an announcement
Test Data: Service to offer, title, description, location, and points required
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Tap on the "Create Announcement" button
3. Enter the service to offer, title, description, location, and points required
4. Tap on the "Create" button
Expected Result: The announcement is successfully created and can be viewed by others

Title: Geolocation and Device Identification
Preconditions: User has enabled location services on their device.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Allow the application to access the user's location.
3. Verify that the application is able to identify the user's location.
4. Verify that the application is able to identify nearby devices.
Expected Result: The application successfully identifies the user's location and nearby devices.

Title: Change of Target Audience
Preconditions: Administrator has access to the application's settings.
Test Steps:
1. Access the application's settings.
2. Navigate to the target audience settings.
3. Change the target audience to the desired group (e.g. seniors).
4. Save the changes.
Expected Result: The application's target audience is successfully changed to the specified group.

Title: Virtual Currency (Punti Quartiere)
Preconditions: User has performed a service for another user.
Test Steps:
1. Perform a service for another user.
2. Verify that the user receives the agreed upon number of Punti Quartiere.
Expected Result: The user receives the agreed upon number of Punti Quartiere.

Title: User Interface (UI)
Preconditions: User has access to the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate through the application's interface.
3. Verify that the interface is user-friendly and intuitive.
Expected Result: The interface is user-friendly and intuitive.

Title: User Experience (UX)
Preconditions: User has access to the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate through the application's interface.
3. Verify that the user experience is positive and enjoyable.
Expected Result: The user experience is positive and enjoyable.

Title: Shortcuts
Preconditions: User has access to the application and is familiar with the keyboard shortcuts.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Use a keyboard shortcut to perform a common action.
3. Verify that the action is performed correctly.
Expected Result: The action is performed correctly using the keyboard shortcut.

Title: Throughput
Preconditions: User has access to the application and is performing actions.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Perform actions within the application.
3. Measure the time it takes to complete the actions.
Expected Result: The application has a reasonable throughput and the actions are completed in a timely manner.

Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the user details.
3. Click on the submit button.
Expected Result: A new user profile is created.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the user credentials.
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the home page.

Title: Create Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the create announcement page.
2. Enter the announcement details.
3. Click on the submit button.
Expected Result: A new announcement is created and displayed on the announcement list.

Test Steps:

Expected Result: The selected announcement is displayed.

Test Steps:

Expected Result: The user is added to the list of candidates for the announcement.

Preconditions: User logged in as the announcement creator, Candidate list available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the candidate list page.
2. Select a candidate to accept.
Expected Result: The selected candidate is accepted for the announcement.

Title: Delete Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement list page.
2. Select an announcement to delete.
Expected Result: The selected announcement is deleted from the announcement list.

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement list page.
2. Select an announcement created by another user.
3. Click on the user's name to view their profile.
Expected Result: The selected user's profile is displayed.

Title: Update Account Information
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account settings page.
2. Update the user details.
3. Click on the save button.
Expected Result: The user's account information is updated.

Title: Update Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement details page.
2. Update the announcement details.
3. Click on the save button.
Expected Result: The announcement details are updated.

Title: Signup
Test Steps:

2. Enter the new user details

Expected Result: The user is successfully registered and can log in to the application.

Title: Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the registered user credentials
3. Click on the login button
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in and can access the application.

Title: Create Announcement
Test Data: Job offer or service request details
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the create announcement page
2. Enter the job offer or service request details
3. Click on the submit button
Expected Result: The announcement is successfully created and can be viewed by other users.

Title: View Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement bacheca (board)
2. Verify that the created announcement is displayed
Expected Result: The created announcement is displayed correctly.

Title: Prebook Announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in, Announcement has been created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement details page
2. Click on the prebook button
Expected Result: The user is added to the list of candidates for the announcement.

Title: Accept Announcement
Preconditions: User who created the announcement has viewed the list of candidates, User who prebooked the announcement is in the list of candidates
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the list of candidates for the announcement
2. Select the user who prebooked the announcement
3. Click on the accept button
Expected Result: The user who prebooked the announcement is accepted for the announcement.

Title: Reject Announcement
Preconditions: User who created the announcement has viewed the list of candidates, User who prebooked the announcement is in the list of candidates
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the list of candidates for the announcement
2. Select the user who prebooked the announcement
3. Click on the reject button
Expected Result: The user who prebooked the announcement is rejected for the announcement.

Title: Eliminate Announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in and has created an announcement.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement page.
2. Click on the delete button for the specific announcement.
3. Confirm the deletion in the pop-up.
Expected Result: The announcement is removed from the user's list and the platform.

Title: View Other User's Profile
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user search page.
2. Search for another user.
3. Click on the user's profile from the search results.
Expected Result: The user's profile is displayed with their information.

Title: Modify Account
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account settings page.
2. Update the account information.
3. Click on the save button.
Expected Result: The account information is updated.

Title: Modify Announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in and has created an announcement.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement page.
2. Click on the edit button for the specific announcement.
3. Update the announcement details.
4. Click on the save button.
Expected Result: The announcement details are updated.

Title: User Signup
Preconditions: User has not previously created an account.
Test Data: Name, Surname, Phone number, Email, Home address, Password.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the signup page.
2. Enter the required user details.
3. Click on the "Signup" button.
Expected Result: A message is displayed indicating that the account has been created successfully.

Title: Duplicate User Data
Preconditions: User has previously created an account with the same phone number, email, or home address.
Test Data: Same phone number, email, or home address as a previously created account.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the signup page.
2. Enter the duplicate user details.
3. Click on the "Signup" button.
Expected Result: The signup process fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: Post Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement posting page.
2. Enter the required announcement details.
3. Click on the "Post" button.
Expected Result: The announcement is posted and is visible to other users.

Title: Open Chat
Preconditions: Two users are logged in and have each other's contact information.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the chat page for User B.
2. Click on the "Start Chat" button.
Expected Result: A chat window is opened between User A and User B.

Title: Logout
Preconditions: The user must have logged in to the application
Test Steps:
1. Select the "Logout" option.
2. Confirm the logout.
Expected Result: The user exits the application.

Title: Database Integrity
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the database is properly set up and configured for the application.
2. Verify that the database can store, retrieve, and modify announcements in real-time.
3. Verify that the database can correctly handle the exchange of points.
Expected Result: The database functions as expected.

Title: Device Requirements
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the device meets the minimum requirements for the application:
Android 6.0 Marshmallow or higher
1 GB of RAM
At least 100 MB of free storage space
Expected Result: The device meets the minimum requirements for the application.

Title: User Feedback
Test Steps:
1. Gather user feedback on the application by conducting interviews.
2. Analyze the feedback to identify potential improvements or additions to the application.
Expected Result: The application is improved based on user feedback.

Title: Verify the ability to send Quarter Points to others
Preconditions: User has Quarter Points to send
Test Data: User with Quarter Points, Recipient with no Quarter Points
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the ShareShelf application.
2. Navigate to the "Quarter Points" section.
3. Select the desired amount of Quarter Points to send.
4. Enter the recipient's phone number or email address.
5. Confirm the transaction.
Expected Result: The selected amount of Quarter Points is successfully sent to the recipient.

Title: Verify the ability to communicate with other users
Test Data: User with a question or request, Other user with the necessary information
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the ShareShelf application.
2. Navigate to the communication feature.
3. Send a message to another user.
4. Verify that the message is received by the other user.
Expected Result: The message is successfully sent and received by the other user.

Title: Verify the ability to publish periodic announcements
Preconditions: User has a periodic announcement to publish
Test Data: Announcement content, Frequency of the announcement
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the ShareShelf application.
2. Navigate to the "Announcements" section.
3. Create a new announcement with the provided content and frequency.
4. Verify that the announcement is published according to the specified frequency.
Expected Result: The announcement is published according to the specified frequency.

Title: Verify the ability to republish an expired announcement
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the ShareShelf application.
2. Navigate to the "Announcements" section.
3. Select the expired announcement.
4. Update the expiration date.
5. Verify that the announcement is republished with the new expiration date.
Expected Result: The announcement is republished with the new expiration date.

Title: Verify the ability to use GPS tracking without manual address input
Preconditions: User is logged in and has location services enabled
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the ShareShelf application.
2. Navigate to a feature that requires location input.
3. Verify that the application uses GPS to determine the user's location without requiring manual address input.
Expected Result: The application uses GPS to determine the user's location without requiring manual address input.

Title: Verify the presence of bugs
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the ShareShelf application.
2. Navigate through the application and perform various actions.
3. Verify if any unexpected behavior or errors occur.
Expected Result: No unexpected behavior or errors occur.

Title: Verify the ease of learning the application
Test Steps:
1. Download and install the ShareShelf application.
2. Register as a new user.
3. Perform various actions within the application.
4. Evaluate the ease of learning the application based on the user's experience.
Expected Result: The application is considered easy to learn by the user.

Title: Verify the appeal of the application's design
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the ShareShelf application.
2. Navigate through the application and evaluate the design elements.
3. Provide feedback on the appeal of the application's design.
Expected Result: The application's design is considered appealing by the user.
